hooks.command:
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(html|css)$'; then python3 -c "
import re, sys, os

fpath = '$FILE'
if not os.path.exists(fpath):
    sys.exit(0)

with open(fpath, encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# ユーティリティページはスキップ
basename = os.path.basename(fpath)
skip = ['ogp-generator.html', 'preview-diagram.html', 'od-overflow-check.html']
if basename in skip or 'mockup' in basename:
    sys.exit(0)

warnings = []
errors = []

# ===== 1. 540px ブレークポイント必須 =====
if '@media' in content:  # CSSを含むHTMLのみ
    if '@media (max-width: 540px)' not in content and '@media(max-width:540px)' not in content:
        errors.append('BLOCK: 540px ブレークポイントがありません。モバイル表示に必須です')

# ===== 2. 768px ブレークポイント必須 =====
    if '@media (max-width: 768px)' not in content and '@media(max-width:768px)' not in content:
        errors.append('BLOCK: 768px ブレークポイントがありません。タブレット表示に必須です')

# ===== 3. overflow-x: hidden 必須 =====
    if 'overflow-x: hidden' not in content and 'overflow-x:hidden' not in content:
        errors.append('BLOCK: html,body に overflow-x: hidden がありません')

# ===== 4. ナビCSS整合性 =====
if 'nav-logo' in content:
    # margin-right: 4rem 必須
    logo_blocks = re.findall(r'\.nav-logo[^{]*\{[^}]*\}', content, re.DOTALL)
    has_margin_right = any('margin-right' in b for b in logo_blocks)
    if not has_margin_right:
        errors.append('BLOCK: .nav-logo に margin-right: 4rem がありません')
    # flex-shrink: 0 必須
    has_flex_shrink = any('flex-shrink' in b for b in logo_blocks)
    if not has_flex_shrink:
        errors.append('BLOCK: .nav-logo に flex-shrink: 0 がありません')

if 'nav-links' in content:
    # margin-left: auto 必須
    links_blocks = re.findall(r'\.nav-links[^a][^{]*\{[^}]*\}', content, re.DOTALL)
    has_ml_auto = any('margin-left: auto' in b or 'margin-left:auto' in b for b in links_blocks)
    if not has_ml_auto:
        warnings.append('WARNING: .nav-links に margin-left: auto がありません')
    # justify-content: space-between は NG
    nav_blocks = re.findall(r'nav[^-][^{]*\{[^}]*\}', content, re.DOTALL)
    has_space_between = any('space-between' in b for b in nav_blocks if 'footer' not in b)
    if has_space_between:
        warnings.append('WARNING: nav に justify-content: space-between があります（非推奨）')

# ===== 5. ロゴ・フッターの white-space: nowrap =====
for cls in ['footer-logo', 'nav-logo-text']:
    pattern = r'\.' + cls + r'[^{]*\{[^}]*\}'
    for m in re.finditer(pattern, content, re.DOTALL):
        if 'nowrap' not in m.group():
            warnings.append(f'WARNING: .{cls} に white-space: nowrap がない可能性')

# ===== 6. h1 に clamp() 推奨 =====
for m in re.finditer(r'(hero[^{]*h1|section-title|contact-title|methods-title)[^}]*font-size:\s*(\d+)px', content):
    warnings.append(f'WARNING: {m.group(1).strip()} に clamp() なしの固定 {m.group(2)}px')

# ===== 7. フッターモバイル対応 =====
mobile_blocks = re.findall(r'@media[^{]*max-width:\s*768px[^{]*\{(.+?)\n\s*\}\s*\n', content, re.DOTALL)
mobile_css = ' '.join(mobile_blocks)
if 'footer' in content and mobile_blocks:
    if 'flex-direction: column' not in mobile_css and 'flex-direction:column' not in mobile_css:
        if 'footer' not in mobile_css:
            warnings.append('WARNING: 768px メディアクエリにフッターのモバイル対応がありません')

# 出力
if errors:
    print('\n'.join(errors))
    print('\n上記の問題を修正してください。')
    sys.exit(2)
if warnings:
    print('\n'.join(warnings))
    sys.exit(0)
" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
